score

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
v0.01-plus
formal 不改
+ sidecar:
mss_score
+ overlay:
Broker 风险覆盖

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
blueprint 当前主线
formal 仍是:
date
score
signal
变化:
语义改成纯市场级风险层
扩出 phase / phase_trend / phase_days
position_advice / risk_regime
先落 trace / overlay 不进 formal

industry

signal_id
code

strength

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

v0.01-plus
formal 不改

bof_strength
irs_score
mss_score
final_score
final_rank
variant

排序真相源先写 l3_signal_rank_exp

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
blueprint 当前主线
formal 仍最小稳定
+ sidecar 分层冻结
变化:
pattern 从单 BOF
走向 BOF / BPB / PB / TST / CPB
PAS quality / reference 不进 formal Signal
